summary: Replaced the starter AI Delivery Kit artifacts with NoiseCut UI-specific repo-local planning, state, and first workflow records without adding runtime application code.
Created the UI-local Founder Product Signal Report contract artifact and updated state without runtime application code or sibling repo changes.
Recorded the scaffold decision as Vite + React + TypeScript with npm without creating runtime application files.
Created the initial Vite React TypeScript npm app scaffold with build and test validation passing.
Added API readiness and metadata client skeleton with UI status rendering and tests.
Connected the UI form to existing analysis-job submission and polling with verdict-style result rendering and tests.
Defined the future API-owned Product Signal Report projection boundary without runtime code or sibling repo changes.
Updated the UI to prefer additive report projection rendering while preserving verdict-style fallback behavior.
Added UI-owned Markdown export for structured Product Signal Reports with deterministic formatting, clipboard copy, and compatibility-safe fallback behavior.
Planned the next UI work unit to add lightweight report feedback submission through the existing API feedback endpoint.
Added lightweight report feedback submission to the UI using the existing API feedback endpoint with useful/not-useful actions and privacy-safe metadata.
Planned the next cross-repo, UI-primary unit for additive URL-only report generation with API-first delivery and a future guarded UI mode toggle.
Enabled URL-only submission mode in the UI, preserved pasted-evidence mode, and switched capability gating to additive API metadata.
validation: npm run build passed; npm test -- --run passed with 20 tests.
remaining_risks: The UI depends on the API metadata capability contract remaining accurate.

summary: Locked the v0 UI boundary so Reddit remains the only URL-only source advertised by API metadata while YouTube stays available through pasted evidence only.
validation: npm run build; npm test -- --run; validate-ai-docs.ps1 . -Topology SingleRepo.
remaining_risks: The UI depends on the API metadata capability contract remaining accurate.
Future platform expansion still needs an explicit follow-up task with clear demand, a stable extraction source, and API/extension instruction acceptance.

summary: Added persistent submission-mode guidance and automatically returned the form to pasted evidence when URL-only stopped matching the current source capability.
remaining_risks: The UI depends on the API metadata capability contract remaining accurate.
Future platform expansion still needs an explicit follow-up task.

summary: Corrected .ai/STATE.md, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, .ai/ROADMAP.md, and .ai/DECISIONS.md to reflect the shipped Allegro Product Risk & Opportunity Report UI (commit bf6ac02) instead of the stale Reddit/YouTube Founder-lens narrative and false no-runtime-scaffold claim; added ADR-002 and ADR-003 and opened Phase 003 (Localization Hardening) with Slices 012-019 and matching task packets.
validation: validate-ai-docs.ps1 . -Topology SingleRepo (docs-only; no application code touched).
remaining_risks: Consolidating the four duplicated string dictionaries risks wording drift.
Slice 015 is cross-repo blocked on noise-cut-api Slice 010.

summary: Added i18next/react-i18next/i18next-browser-languagedetector (pinned versions), wired I18nextProvider into main.tsx, and mechanically ported all ~140 keys from src/i18n.ts into 5 namespace JSON files under src/locales/{en,pl}/. src/i18n.ts untouched; zero visible behavior change. Also recorded that noise-cut-api confirmed ApiError.Message is now always English.
validation: npm run build passed; npm test -- --run passed 39/39.
remaining_risks: Consolidating the four duplicated string dictionaries (Slice 013) risks wording drift.
Slice 015 remains cross-repo dependent on noise-cut-api Slice 010's Params field.
